prompt:
A slim 10 mL flux pen with a translucent body lies on an electronics workbench, its fine felt tip slightly tinted from use and a protective cap snapped off and resting nearby. The pen body shows a faint fluid level and a simple icon-based label, with no readable text, clearly indicating it dispenses no-clean flux for soldering and rework. A small PCB with freshly soldered joints and a soldering iron tip nearby hint at the pen’s role in improving solder flow.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk electronics station with soft, even lighting, an anti-static mat under the work, and neatly organized tools and components visible in gentle soft focus. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with light stylization, no logos or legible writing on the pen or tools, and a composition that centers the flux pen, its tip, and the nearby PCB while the rest of the bench remains softly blurred.
